name: Claude Conversations
description: Claude conversations including chat ids, titles, URLs, and full thread messages when the authenticated conversation API is available.

name.description: Display name shown in the Claude user menu.

plan.description: Current Claude plan label shown in the user menu.

organizationId.description: Active Claude organization id used for authenticated API requests.

conversations.description: Chats collected from Claude, enriched with full thread data when possible.

id.description: Chat identifier parsed from the sidebar route when available.

title.description: Conversation title shown in the Claude sidebar.

href.description: Relative Claude route for the conversation.

createdAt.description: Conversation creation timestamp if Claude returned one.

updatedAt.description: Conversation update timestamp if Claude returned one.

starred.description: Whether Claude marked the conversation as starred, when available.

projectId.description: Associated Claude project id, when present.

messageCount.description: Number of messages collected for the conversation.

messages.description: Thread messages collected from Claude's conversation API.

sender.description: Message sender role, such as human or assistant.

parentId.description: Parent message id in the conversation tree.

content.description: Flattened text content extracted from the Claude message payload.

attachments.description: Message attachments returned by Claude, if any.

fetchError.description: Error captured when Claude conversation detail could not be fetched.

messageTotal.description: Total number of messages exported across all conversations.

source.description: How the data was collected for this export.

apiError.description: Top-level API error message when Claude conversation APIs were unavailable.
